svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"><diagram name="Diagram" id="d1"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="500" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0" /><mxCell id="1" parent="0" /><mxCell id="start" value="RecStart is called" style="rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="0" y="60" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="fill" value="Fill pre-trigger data" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="180" y="0" width="160" height="50" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="d_pre" value="Is pre-trigger data<br>completely filled?" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="180" y="100" width="200" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="d_trig" value="Are<br>Trigger 1 (AND/OR) Trigger 2<br>(AND/OR) Trigger 3 detected?" value="Continue<br>recording" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="730" y="80" width="130" height="50" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="end" value="End of recording" style="rounded=1;arcSize=50;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="900" y="80" width="130" height="50" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e0" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="start" target="d_pre"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="d_pre" target="fill"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" target="cont"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="e5" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cont" target="end"><mxGeometry relative="1"
